title: Senior Project Engineer (Mechanical) — Contract
description_raw:
Brunel Energy are seeking a Senior Project Engineer (Mechanical) to support a topsides brownfield modification project in the Central North Sea. The role is outside IR35.

The Senior Project Engineer will act as the single point of accountability for mechanical package delivery within the project team, working closely with the Project Manager and engineering disciplines.

Key responsibilities:
- Own the mechanical engineering package from FEED through detailed design and construction
- Manage vendors and subcontractors for mechanical equipment (pressure vessels, pumps, compressors)
- Prepare and maintain the mechanical engineering project plan within the overall project schedule
- Conduct technical reviews of mechanical deliverables and vendor documentation
- Coordinate with offshore hook-up and commissioning team during topsides installation
- Track progress against milestones and report to the project manager

Profile:
- Degree in mechanical engineering
- 10+ years mechanical engineering experience in oil and gas offshore
- BOSIET/HUET mandatory
- Prior FEED and detailed design experience on topside modifications

Rate: £600/day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Aberdeen office + offshore rotation
